chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.D-10 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on M.A. No.3044/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.3045/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on M.A. No.3046/2021. 20.04.2021 Mr. Ashfaque Ali Khaskheli, Advocate for the applicant. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the applicant chose not to press this application; however, 15 days’ more time is granted to the applicant to put forward complete investigation report in the subject crime before the Court concerned. This Criminal Revision Application is accordingly disposed of with direction to applicant by giving 15 days’ more time to complete the investigation and file a comprehensive investigation report as directed by Trial Court. In the meanwhile, no coercive action be taken against the applicant during intervening period on this account. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
